findings.issue: Implementation hint says 'Phase 3 like-figma (строки 152-195 SKILL.md) — основа для фаз 1-4 нового скилла'. Phase 3 content is lines 152-195 (accurate), but the new skill's Phase 0 (Readiness Check: validate tokens.json) maps to like-figma's Mode Detection block (lines 56-70), not Phase 3. The hint omits this relevant source section.
findings.fix: Extend the hint: 'Mode Detection (строки 56-70) содержит логику проверки DS (Mode B path) для Phase 0; Phase 3 (строки 152-195) — основа для фаз 1-4'

findings.issue: Task 6 declares depends_on: [1] but its Details section explicitly states 'design-retrospective автономен — он работает с проектными файлами .design-system/, а не с reference-файлами скиллов'. The skill references only skills/retrospective/SKILL.md and skills/skill-master/SKILL.md, both of which exist independently of Task 1. The declared dependency is technically harmless but creates a false serialization constraint in Wave 2.
findings.fix: Either remove depends_on: [1] (Task 6 has no actual dependency on Task 1 output) or add a comment explaining the dependency is a wave-ordering convention, not a file dependency.
